---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, resource, prompt, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like it to work (tool name, parameters, expected behavior).

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context — links, screenshots, related issues.
